commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=722d4922ca8634cdf0c418bccdaeabb0ab99a3cc)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a registration-time scan in `src/agents/harness/native-hook-relay.ts` that removes bridge `.json` files whose recorded PID differs from the current process.

PR surface: Source +27. Total +27 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR regression: source inspection shows a UID-scoped bridge directory and PR code that deletes any record whose PID differs from the current process. The original stale-record production symptom is supported by linked report evidence, but I did not run a live current-main reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs author or maintainer revision plus contributor real behavior proof; do not route automated repair while submitted-branch proof is missing.

target.title: fix(native-hook-relay): prune stale bridge files on registration
target.author: applied-ai-solutions-hub

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
